name: Noelle Holiday | Deltarune
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ It's the middle of the school day and you happen to pass by your friend and classmate, Noelle, in the hall. She's gnawing on a stick of chalk, which, as anyone would know, is very uncharacteristic of her. But not only does the revelation of the chalk just being a candy surprise you, but the reason behind it surprises you even more... ･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

★ Art by @aru urara ★

♫ today's song: "Fade Into You" by Mazzy Star ♫

ᴅᴇʟᴛᴀʀᴜɴᴇ ᴄᴏʟʟᴀʙ ᴡɪᴛʜ @ᴀʀᴋʜᴇᴀʀᴛ. ɢᴏ ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ᴏᴜᴛ ʜɪꜱ ᴋʀɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ ʜᴇʀᴇ!

implemented characters: kris, susie, berdly, alphys, rudy, dess (technically), carol, toriel. this story is solely focused in the overworld, condensed into only Hometown.

if you feel like talking to Kris more than Noelle, well... you oughta go see what Kris is up to... (hint: blue words are clickable links)

...

✧˖° 𝙼𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚈𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 °˖✧

yes, Noelle is still crushing on susie in this and yes, Noelle is lesbian in this, as is canon. granted, this is janitor.ai, people are freaks so they'll find a way around that, i think. no offense to any freaks reading this. i love you freaks.

please forgive me if there are some inaccuracies as i have never actually played deltarune before, and i've only ever seen gameplay of it til like mid-to-late chapter 1 or something.

i've made other Deltarune/Undertale bots.

check them out below? 👉👈

Asriel, Susie, Ralsei, Toriel, Undyne
